~%2FDesktop%2FGeorgeMasonUniversity%2FFall%202025%2FR_CDS101%2Fcds101_starter_kit_gmu_rmd_v3%2FMakefile="AF582F71"

~%2FDesktop%2FGeorgeMasonUniversity%2FFall%202025%2FR_CDS101%2Fcds101_starter_kit_gmu_rmd_v3%2Fnotebooks%2Feda_walkthrough.Rmd="9B90E299"
~%2FDesktop%2FGeorgeMasonUniversity%2FFall%202025%2FR_CDS101%2Fcds101_starter_kit_gmu_rmd_v3%2Fproposal_template.Rmd="6BDA56B1"
~%2FDesktop%2FGeorgeMasonUniversity%2FFall%202025%2FR_CDS101%2Fcds101_starter_kit_gmu_rmd_v3%2Fproposal_template.md="231B5D1C"
